en: If you find something exciting or you want to learn more about it you could say you're
interested but it's a little bit boring Try these three advanced alternatives for
First we have engrossed engrossed I was engrossed in her
fascinated I was fascinated by his eyes And number three
captivated I was captivated by her beauty If you want to speak English beautifully
fluently and confidently with an advanced
rich vocabulary I have just opened the doors to my beautiful British English B2 programme
Click on the link in the pinned comment to join
